message:
🐛 Fix null array crash in GPU Node Health Monitor (#1164)

Go nil slices serialize to JSON `null` instead of `[]`. When a healthy
GPU node has zero issues, `issues` was null in the API response, causing
`.map()` to crash in the frontend. Initialize slices as empty non-nil
in the backend, and add defensive `|| []` guards in the frontend.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
